_comment: THE LIVE TOWN's knob defaults — data/ is the all-features town (PNO.D2), so every knob the engine reads is authored here explicitly rather than left to SimConfig's C# defaults. Two of these are known-dead and authored only so the file stays a complete inventory: copresence_bonus is read by ZERO engine code, and the storylet_rate slider's 1.0-3.0 half is a no-op (FireGate early-returns at rate >= 1.0, so only 0.0-1.0 thins). storylet_cooldown_scale is genuinely live (StoryletEngine.cs:68) but has no slider.
